name: geas
description: A governance protocol that makes AI agents work as a professional team — contract-driven execution, evidence-based verification, and cross-session learning.

interface.shortDescription: Contract-driven execution and evidence-based verification for agent teams
interface.longDescription: Use Geas to run multi-step missions with explicit scope, task contracts, specialist agents, evidence gates, and cross-session memory.
defaultPrompt: Start a Geas mission for this project.
